mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_no /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectEvalTargetList */ , e.emp_nm , e.dept_cd , d.dept_nm , p.pos_nm , CASE WHEN r.target_emp_no IS NOT NULL THEN '완료' ELSE '대기' END AS evalStatCd FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN position_mst P ON e.pos_cd = p.pos_cd LEFT JOIN dept D ON e.dept_cd = d.dept_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT target_emp_no FROM qual_eval_result WHERE eval_year = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND eval_quarter = CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MM')) BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END ) r ON e.emp_no = r.target_emp_no WHERE TRIM(e.dept_cd) = #{deptCd} AND e.emp_stat_cd = 'WORK' ORDER BY e.pos_cd ASC, e.emp_nm ASC

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectQuantEvalTargetList */ e.emp_no , e.emp_nm , e.dept_cd , d.dept_nm , p.pos_nm , CASE WHEN r.emp_no IS NOT NULL THEN '완료' ELSE '대기' END AS evalStatCd FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN position_mst P ON e.pos_cd = p.pos_cd LEFT JOIN dept D ON e.dept_cd = d.dept_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT emp_no FROM QUANT_EVAL_RESULT WHERE eval_year = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND eval_half = CASE WHEN TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MM')) BETWEEN 1 AND 6 THEN 'H1' ELSE 'H2' END ) r ON e.emp_no = r.emp_no WHERE TRIM(e.dept_cd) = #{deptCd} AND e.emp_stat_cd = 'WORK' ORDER BY e.pos_cd ASC, e.emp_nm ASC

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectEmpDetailByNo */ e.EMP_NO , e.EMP_NM , d.DEPT_NM , p.POS_NM FROM EMP E LEFT JOIN position_mst P ON e.POS_CD = p.POS_CD LEFT JOIN dept D ON e.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD WHERE e.EMP_NO = #{targetEmpNo} AND e.EMP_STAT_CD = 'WORK'
SELECT COUNT(*) /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectCountQualEval */ FROM qual_eval_master WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectListQualEval */ M.EVAL_CD , m.dept_cd , m.eval_item_nm , m.use_yn , r.rubric_seq , r.eval_score , r.score_desc FROM ( SELECT EVAL_CD , DEPT_CD , EVAL_ITEM_NM , USE_YN FROM qual_eval_master WHERE dept_cd = #{deptCd} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY eval_cd ASC OFFSET #{paging.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{paging.recordSize} ROWS ONLY ) M INNER JOIN qual_eval_rubric R ON m.eval_cd = r.eval_cd ORDER BY m.eval_cd ASC, r.eval_score DESC

SELECT DISTINCT p.project_no, p.project_nm, p.project_desc, p.project_stat_cd, p.start_dtm, p.end_dtm FROM project p INNER JOIN kpi k ON p.project_no = k.proj_no INNER JOIN assign_task t ON k.kpi_no = t.kpi_no WHERE p.use_yn = 'Y' AND t.del_yn = 'N' AND t.emp_no = #{empNo} ORDER BY p.start_dtm DESC

SELECT DISTINCT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectKpiListByProj */ k.kpi_no , k.kpi_parent_no , k.proj_no , k.kpi_nm , k.start_dtm , k.end_dtm , k.use_yn , k.progress_rate , k.kpi_cn , k.kpi_type_cd FROM KPI k INNER JOIN ASSIGN_TASK t ON k.kpi_no = t.kpi_no WHERE k.proj_no = #{projNo} AND k.use_yn = 'Y' AND t.del_yn = 'N' AND t.emp_no = #{empNo} ORDER BY k.kpi_no ASC

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectTaskListByKpi */ TASK_NO , EMP_NO , KPI_NO , DEPT_CD , TASK_TITLE , TASK_CN , TASK_STAT_CD , REG_DTM , MOD_DTM , DEL_YN , DEL_DTM , PROGRESS_RATE , TASK_START_DTM , TASK_END_DTM FROM ASSIGN_TASK WHERE KPI_NO = #{kpiNo} AND EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY TASK_NO DESC
SELECT kpi_no, kpi_nm, progress_rate, proj_no FROM KPI WHERE proj_no = #{projNo} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY kpi_no ASC

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectDailyTaskLogListByTask */ task_log_no , task_no , emp_no , log_div_cd , log_title , log_cn , work_dtm , reg_dtm , mod_dtm , del_yn , del_dtm FROM daily_task_log WHERE task_no = #{taskNo} ORDER BY reg_dtm DESC

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectPersonalTaskList */ task_no , emp_no , kpi_no , dept_cd , task_title , task_cn , task_stat_cd , reg_dtm , mod_dtm , del_yn , del_dtm , progress_rate , task_start_dtm , task_end_dtm FROM assign_task WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND KPI_NO IS NULL AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY task_no DESC

choose.otherwise:
SELECT t.task_no AS project_no , t.task_title AS project_nm , t.task_cn AS project_desc , t.task_stat_cd AS project_stat_cd , t.task_start_dtm AS start_dtm , t.task_end_dtm AS end_dtm , e.emp_nm FROM assign_task t INNER JOIN emp e ON t.emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE e.emp_no = #{empNo} AND t.kpi_no IS NULL
AND t.task_start_dtm <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND t.task_end_dtm >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN TRUNC(t.task_start_dtm) AND TRUNC(t.task_end_dtm)
AND t.task_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

mapper.select: SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectEmpPerformanceFact */ T.EMP_NO , COUNT(T.TASK_NO) , AVG(NVL(T.PROGRESS_RATE, 0)) , AVG(NVL(K.PROGRESS_RATE, 0)) FROM ASSIGN_TASK T LEFT OUTER JOIN KPI K ON T.KPI_NO = K.KPI_NO WHERE T.EMP_NO = #{empNo} GROUP BY T.EMP_NO

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectLogsForVectorSync */ T.TASK_NO , T.EMP_NO , NVL(P.PROJECT_NM, '일반과업') AS PROJECT_NM , NVL(K.KPI_NM, '개인직무과업') AS KPI_NM , NVL(K.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS KPI_PROGRESS , T.TASK_TITLE , NVL(T.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) AS TASK_PROGRESS , NVL(L.LOG_CN, '기록없음') AS LOG_CONTENT , TO_CHAR(NVL(L.REG_DTM, T.REG_DTM), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM ASSIGN_TASK T LEFT OUTER JOIN KPI K ON T.KPI_NO = K.KPI_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PROJECT P ON K.PROJ_NO = P.PROJECT_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN DAILY_TASK_LOG L ON T.TASK_NO = L.TASK_NO AND L.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE T.EMP_NO = #{empNo} ORDER BY T.REG_DTM DESC

SELECT /* com.flowenect.hr.eval.mapper.EvalMapper.selectPersonalLogsForVector */ T.TASK_NO AS "taskNo" , '개인업무' AS "projectNm" , '[개인업무] ' || '▶ 업무: ' || T.TASK_TITLE || ' (진행: ' || NVL(T.PROGRESS_RATE, 0) || '%) | ' || '▶ 일지: ' || NVL(L.LOG_CN, '상세 기록 없음') AS "vectorContent" , TO_CHAR(NVL(L.REG_DTM, T.REG_DTM), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "regDtm" FROM ASSIGN_TASK T LEFT OUTER JOIN DAILY_TASK_LOG L ON T.TASK_NO = L.TASK_NO AND L.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE T.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND (T.KPI_NO IS NULL OR T.KPI_NO = 0) ORDER BY T.TASK_NO ASC

SELECT EVAL_RES_NO AS evalResNo , EMP_NO AS empNo , EVAL_YEAR AS evalYear , EVAL_HALF AS evalHalf , SCORE_ALIGN AS scoreAlign , SCORE_SPEED AS scoreSpeed , SCORE_FAITH AS scoreFaith , SCORE_REACH AS scoreReach , SCORE_DIFF AS scoreDiff , AI_SUMMARY AS aiSummary , REG_EMP_NO AS regEmpNo , REG_COMENT AS regComent , TO_CHAR(REG_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS regDtm FROM QUANT_EVAL_RESULT WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND EVAL_YEAR = '2026' /* 필요시 파라미터화 */ AND EVAL_HALF = 'H1' /* 필요시 파라미터화 */ ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY /* 가장 최근 데이터 1건만 */
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPT_AI_REPORT ( DEPT_CD, AI_INSIGHT, PERFORMANCE_GRADE, ANALYSIS_DATE ) VALUES ( #{deptCd}, #{aiInsight, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{performanceGrade}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DEPT_CD as "deptCd", AI_INSIGHT as "aiInsight", PERFORMANCE_GRADE as "performanceGrade", TO_CHAR(ANALYSIS_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "analysisDate" FROM DEPT_AI_REPORT WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} ORDER BY ANALYSIS_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT REPORT_ID AS "reportId", TARGET_EMP_NO AS "targetEmpNo", MODEL_CD AS "modelCd", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(ANALYSIS_TEXT, 4000, 1) AS "analysisText", SIMILARITY AS "similarity", CONSENSUS AS "consensus", TO_CHAR(REG_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "regDtm" FROM PEER_AI_REPORT WHERE TARGET_EMP_NO = #{empNo} ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT RESULT_NO, EVAL_SCORE, EVAL_COMMENT, EVAL_QUARTER, TO_CHAR(EVAL_DTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as EVAL_DTM FROM QUAL_EVAL_RESULT WHERE TARGET_EMP_NO = #{empNo} ORDER BY EVAL_CD ASC
